lines.issue: logo subtitle malformed: leading glyphs read 'EW' instead of 'W' in WHOLESALE
price 12.99 sits slightly left of the price column set by line 8's 15.85; right edges not flush
TAX 0.00 implausible for taxable Costco items (CHEESE TRAY); tax column value rendered in red but zero
AID/VERIFIED BY PIN run together with tight spacing; reads cramped vs original
AMOUNT $26.82 disagrees with TOTAL 28.84 above — arithmetic mismatch after item removal

worst_lines: line 11: TAX 0.00 implausible for taxable items
line 9: price not flush with column above

thermal.hybrid_issues: body font renders too crisp/uniform vs the original's thermal dot-gain and slight ink bleed; logo subtitle 'WHOLESALE' garbled to 'EWHOLESALE'; some label/value pairs run together with tight spacing
thermal.glyph_issues: no glyph-atlas panel was provided in this render set (only real_vs_synthetic 2-up), so glyph variant could not be compared
thermal.vs_original: both lack the original's thermal texture — faint horizontal banding, uneven ink density, and softened edges; synthetic columns are mathematically clean where the real print shows slight baseline wander and heavier saturation

summary: A clean, mostly legible synthetic Costco receipt whose realism is undercut by a malformed logo subtitle, an implausible TAX 0.00, an AMOUNT/TOTAL arithmetic mismatch, and overly crisp non-thermal text.
